accountID.description:
The primary key of the account resource and the unique identifier for the account.

Aggregated / Manual: Both
Applicable containers: All containers
Endpoints:
  • GET accounts
  • GET accounts/{accountId}
  • GET investmentOptions
  • GET accounts/historicalBalances
  • POST accounts

lastUpdated.description:
Indicates the date and time the document was last updated.

Applicable containers: bank and investment

formType.description: Indicates the type of the tax form.

docType.description: Indicates the type of the document.

name.description:
The name of the document.

Applicable containers: bank and investment

statementDate.description:
Indicates the date and time of the document.

Applicable containers: bank and investment

id.description:
The document's primary key and unique identifier.

Applicable containers: bank and investment

source.description:
Indicates the source of the document download.

Applicable containers: bank and investment

uri.description: Relative URI to fetch the actual document

status.description:
Indicates the status of the document download.

Applicable containers: bank and investment
